
### filtering system calls?  {.smaller}


* example: video player VLC playing a local file on my laptop
* uses <em>73 unique kinds of system calls</em>
* opens many files that <em>are not the video file</em> 

   * libraries
   * fonts
   * configuration files
   * translations of messages
 
<hr class="vspace" />
* can I limit the files my video player can read?
* how do I come up with a useful filter?
